title: atriplex urbica
intro: Atriplex urbica, also known as Orache, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the Amaranthaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Atriplex urbica include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of various diseases, such as arthritis and bronchitis. Atriplex urbica can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in cooking and as a food ingredient in some parts of the world.
